{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Inventory Officer",
  "description": "Aureole Consulting Limited is an HR consulting company which specialize in talent acquisition services, Outsourcing Services, Executive Search, Social Media Job Advertisement, HR consulting amongst other services. Our aim is to revolutionize HR consulting in Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Inventory Officer will be responsible for managing stock levels, tracking inventory movements, and maintaining accurate inventory records to support efficient warehouse and retail operations.
	The role requires close monitoring of stock, regular audits, and coordination with relevant teams to ensure smooth inventory control.


Key Responsibilities


	Receive and verify incoming stock, updating inventory records accordingly
	Maintain accurate inventory records across warehouse and retail locations
	Conduct regular stock counts and reconcile discrepancies
	Monitor stock levels and report shortages or excess stock
	Support periodic inventory audits and stock checks
	Coordinate with procurement and sales teams for stock replenishment
	Ensure proper storage and handling of products
	Generate inventory reports for management review


Requirements


	Minimum of 2 years of experience in inventory management, warehouse operations, or related role
	Proficiency in inventory management software and Microsoft Excel
	Strong attention to detail and organizational skills
	Good communication and teamwork ability
	Experience in retail, FMCG, or skincare industry
	Knowledge of Odoo inventory software.


Salary
N300,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;careers@aureole.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-21",

Inventory Officer Job at Aureole Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        Aureole Consulting Limited is an HR consulting company which specialize in talent acquisition services, Outsourcing Services, Executive Search, Social Media Job Advertisement, HR consulting amongst other services. Our aim is to revolutionize HR consulting in Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Officer

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Inventory Officer will be responsible for managing stock levels, tracking inventory movements, and maintaining accurate inventory records to support efficient warehouse and retail operations.
	The role requires close monitoring of stock, regular audits, and coordination with relevant teams to ensure smooth inventory control.


Key Responsibilities


	Receive and verify incoming stock, updating inventory records accordingly
	Maintain accurate inventory records across warehouse and retail locations
	Conduct regular stock counts and reconcile discrepancies
	Monitor stock levels and report shortages or excess stock
	Support periodic inventory audits and stock checks
	Coordinate with procurement and sales teams for stock replenishment
	Ensure proper storage and handling of products
	Generate inventory reports for management review


Requirements


	Minimum of 2 years of experience in inventory management, warehouse operations, or related role
	Proficiency in inventory management software and Microsoft Excel
	Strong attention to detail and organizational skills
	Good communication and teamwork ability
	Experience in retail, FMCG, or skincare industry
	Knowledge of Odoo inventory software.


Salary
N300,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Superintendent Pharmacist",
  "description": "Erkang Pharmaceuticals is a multinational manufacturer of pharmaceutical products starting up in Ilorin, Kwara State Nigeria. Erkang Pharmaceutical is one of the largest manufacturers of Large Volume Parenterals (Infusion) and other products in the world.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Superintendent Pharmacist

Job Location:&nbsp;Ilorin, Kwara&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Work on and process all the Common Technical Documents (CTD) on behalf of the company
	Liasing and interfacing with external bodies and agencies on healthcare and medicinal matters.
	Registration of premises with the Pharmacists Council of Nigeria (PCN)
	Registration of products with the National Agency for Food Drugs Administration and Control (NAFDAC)
	Facilitating contract manufacturing of products
	Facilitating businesses within the Pharmaceutical Industry in Nigeria
	Co-ordination of tenders for healthcare supplies
	Co-ordination of clinical presentations and meetings with Private Sector clinics, Federal and State government Health institutions
	Co-ordination of imports of finished formulations and APIs
	Liaising with bodies such as the Pharmaceutical Group of the Manufacturers Association of Nigeria (PMGMAN), National Agency for Food Drugs Administration and Control (NAFDAC), Pharmacists Council of Nigeria (PCN), Pharmaceutical Society of Nigeria (PSN), Federal and State Ministries of Health, Customs and Excise Authorities
	Interface with multilateral and Development Agencies such as World Health Organization (WHO), West African Health Organization (WAHO), United Nation Industrial Development Organization (UNIDO), Economic Community of West African States (ECOWAS), International Finance Corporation (IFC) &amp; Centre for Development Enterprise (CDE) on Healthcare and Medicinal matters.
	Other duties as assigned by Management &amp; the Board.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications.
	The candidate must have good experience in large volume parenterals (LVP).


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send CV to:&nbsp;erkangpharma@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Superintendent Pharmacist Job at Erkang Pharmaceuticals




        
    

        
        Erkang Pharmaceuticals is a multinational manufacturer of pharmaceutical products starting up in Ilorin, Kwara State Nigeria. Erkang Pharmaceutical is one of the largest manufacturers of Large Volume Parenterals (Infusion) and other products in the world.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Superintendent Pharmacist

Job Location: Ilorin, Kwara 
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Work on and process all the Common Technical Documents (CTD) on behalf of the company
	Liasing and interfacing with external bodies and agencies on healthcare and medicinal matters.
	Registration of premises with the Pharmacists Council of Nigeria (PCN)
	Registration of products with the National Agency for Food Drugs Administration and Control (NAFDAC)
	Facilitating contract manufacturing of products
	Facilitating businesses within the Pharmaceutical Industry in Nigeria
	Co-ordination of tenders for healthcare supplies
	Co-ordination of clinical presentations and meetings with Private Sector clinics, Federal and State government Health institutions
	Co-ordination of imports of finished formulations and APIs
	Liaising with bodies such as the Pharmaceutical Group of the Manufacturers Association of Nigeria (PMGMAN), National Agency for Food Drugs Administration and Control (NAFDAC), Pharmacists Council of Nigeria (PCN), Pharmaceutical Society of Nigeria (PSN), Federal and State Ministries of Health, Customs and Excise Authorities
	Interface with multilateral and Development Agencies such as World Health Organization (WHO), West African Health Organization (WAHO), United Nation Industrial Development Organization (UNIDO), Economic Community of West African States (ECOWAS), International Finance Corporation (IFC) & Centre for Development Enterprise (CDE) on Healthcare and Medicinal matters.
	Other duties as assigned by Management & the Board.


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications.
	The candidate must have good experience in large volume parenterals (LVP).


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Executive

Job Location:&nbsp;Asaba, Delta
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Runoplast is seeking a results-driven Sales Executive to join our team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for driving sales, expanding our customer base, and increasing market share within our industry.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities
	Build and maintain strong client relationships
	Promote and sell company products effectively
	Meet and exceed sales targets
	Conduct market research and provide feedback on trends
	Prepare and deliver sales reports


Requirements


	Minimum of OND / HND / B.Sc in a Marketing, Business Administration or any related field
	Proven experience in sales (preferably in a related industry)
	Strong communication and negotiation skills
	Ability to work independently and meet targets
	Good knowledge of the local market.

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to:&nbsp;Careers@runola.ng&nbsp;using &ldquo;Sales Executive&ndash; Runoplast Asaba&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

Sales Executive Job at Runola Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Runola is a parent company with four subsidiaries (AdelooSuites, Runoplast, Runoclean, and RunoFeed)committed to delivering high-quality products and services to our customers. With a strong focus on innovation, efficiency, and excellence, we have established ourselves as a trusted name in the industry.

Our company operates across multiple locations, ensuring seamless production and service delivery while upholding the highest standards of professionalism. We value teamwork, integrity, and continuous growth, providing our employees with opportunities to excel in their careers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Executive
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Asaba, Delta
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Runoplast is seeking a results-driven Sales Executive to join our team.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for driving sales, expanding our customer base, and increasing market share within our industry.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities
	Build and maintain strong client relationships
	Promote and sell company products effectively
	Meet and exceed sales targets
	Conduct market research and provide feedback on trends
	Prepare and deliver sales reports


Requirements


	Minimum of OND / HND / B.Sc in a Marketing, Business Administration or any related field
	Proven experience in sales (preferably in a related industry)
	Strong communication and negotiation skills
	Ability to work independently and meet targets
	Good knowledge of the local market.


Salary
?120,000 – ?150,000 / Month (Based on Experience).

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to: [email protected] using “Sales Executive– Runoplast Asaba” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Personal / Executive Assistant",
  "description": "Kaltani is a clean tech recycling and waste management company, pioneering innovative solutions to waste and recycling in Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal / Executive Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About The Role


	This is a strategic executive support role that provides personal, administrative and technical support to the CEO, ensuring smooth management of both professional and personal schedules.


Key Responsibilities
Executive Support &amp; Calendar Management:


	Manage complex schedules, meetings, and priorities for the CEO
	Ensure optimal time allocation aligned with strategic priorities
	Anticipate scheduling conflicts and proactively resolve them


Meeting Support:


	Prepare briefing notes and materials ahead of meetings
	Document key decisions and track action items
	Plan meeting logistics for board and investor engagements


Communication Management:


	Draft high-level communications, reports, and presentations
	Ensure timely and professional correspondence between CEO and internal/external stakeholders.


Strategic Coordination &amp; Follow-ups:


	Track key business decicisons and ensure timely execution
	Prepare status updates and reports for the CEO


Requirements


	3&ndash;5 years of experience supporting senior executives
	Strong business acumen and communication skills
	High discretion and professionalism.


Compensation &amp; Benefits


	Competitive salary with performance-based bonuses + Health care Benefits.

Personal / Executive Assistant Job at Kaltani




        
    

        
        Kaltani is a clean tech recycling and waste management company, pioneering innovative solutions to waste and recycling in Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal / Executive Assistant

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About The Role


	This is a strategic executive support role that provides personal, administrative and technical support to the CEO, ensuring smooth management of both professional and personal schedules.


Key Responsibilities
Executive Support & Calendar Management:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Manage complex schedules, meetings, and priorities for the CEO
	Ensure optimal time allocation aligned with strategic priorities
	Anticipate scheduling conflicts and proactively resolve them


Meeting Support:


	Prepare briefing notes and materials ahead of meetings
	Document key decisions and track action items
	Plan meeting logistics for board and investor engagements


Communication Management:


	Draft high-level communications, reports, and presentations
	Ensure timely and professional correspondence between CEO and internal/external stakeholders.


Strategic Coordination & Follow-ups:


	Track key business decicisons and ensure timely execution
	Prepare status updates and reports for the CEO


Requirements


	3–5 years of experience supporting senior executives
	Strong business acumen and communication skills
	High discretion and professionalism.


Compensation & Benefits


	Competitive salary with performance-based bonuses + Health care Benefits.
    

    

        Click here to Apply
